raw_block:
–1. Son of David and Bath-sheba2Sa 5:14;1Ch 3:5;14:4
–2. A prophet in the time of David
  .His message to David concerning the building of a temple2Sa 7:1-17;1Ch 17:1-15
  .Reproves David for his adultery with Bath-sheba and his murder 
of Uriah2Sa 12:1-15
  .Gives Solomon the name Jedidiah2Sa 12:25
  .Assists Bath-sheba in securing to Solomon, her son, the succession 
to the throne1Ki 1:10-14,22-27
  .Assists in anointing Solomon to be king1Ki 1:32-45
  .Kept the chronicles1Ch 29:29;2Ch 9:29
  .Assists David in the organization of the tabernacle2Ch 29:25

reference_groups.entry_label: –2. A prophet in the time of David
